
    class OSF
    {
        // ---- Core ----
        class core
        {
            class boot      { description = "Initialise global game state namespace"; };
        };

        // ---- Sectors ----
        class sectors
        {
            class setSector          { description = "Set a named field and trigger side effects"; };
            class updateMarker       { description = "Sync map marker color to sector status"; };
        };

        // ---- Save ----
        class save
        {
            class saveState          { description = "Serialise game state to profileNamespace"; };
            class loadState          { description = "Restore game state from profileNamespace"; };
        };

        // ---- ODA ---- (Phase A2 — uncomment when building)
        class oda
        {
        //     file = "scripts\oda";
            class odaInit            { description = "Initialise ODA roster and unit definitions"; };
            class odaSpawn           { description = "Spawn a single ODA slot; assigns identity and joins player group"; };
            class odaDismiss         { description = "Remove a deployed ODA unit and return slot to standby"; };
            class odaMissionStart    { description = "Spawn all ODA slots near the player at mission start"; };
        //     class odaPassives        { description = "Calculate and apply active passive bonuses"; };
        //     class odaIncap           { description = "Handle ODA member incapacitation event"; };
        //     class odaRevive          { description = "Player medkit revive logic"; };
        //     class odaMedicRevive     { description = "Medic auto-revive logic"; };
        //     class odaDeath           { description = "Handle permanent death and replacement timer"; };
        };

        // ---- Militia ---- (Phase A4 — uncomment when building)
        // class militia
        // {
        //     file = "scripts\militia";
        //     class militiaInit        { description = "Initialise militia system"; };
        //     class militiaSpawn       { description = "Spawn militia units on allocation"; };
        //     class militiaDismiss     { description = "Dismiss militia group and free command points"; };
        // };

        // ---- Counterattack ---- (Phase A5 — uncomment when building)
        // class counterattack
        // {
        //     file = "scripts\counterattack";
        //     class caEvaluate         { description = "Evaluate whether a counterattack should trigger"; };
        //     class caLaunch           { description = "Launch counterattack waves on a sector"; };
        //     class caWave             { description = "Spawn a single counterattack wave"; };
        // };

        // ---- Operations ---- (Phase B4 — uncomment when building)
        class operations
        {
            // class opSetup            { description = "Pre-operation setup and briefing"; };
            // class opSuccess          { description = "Handle operation success"; };
            // class opFailure          { description = "Handle operation failure"; };
            // class opAlliedPool       { description = "Track allied AI force pool"; };
        };

        // ---- Side Objectives ---- (Phase A8 — uncomment when building)
        // class sideobj
        // {
        //     file = "scripts\sideobj";
        //     class soScout            { description = "Resolve question mark marker on player approach"; };
        //     class soAADestroy        { description = "AA emplacement side objective"; };
        //     class soIntelGather      { description = "Intel documents side objective"; };
        // };

        // ---- TOC ---- (Phase A2 — uncomment when building)
        class toc
        {
        //     file = "scripts\toc";
               class strategicMapOpen   { description = "Open strategic map from TOC base object" };
               class tocInit            { description = "Initialise TOC interactions"; };
               class tocSquadUI         { description = "Squad management interface"; };
        //     class tocMilitiaUI       { description = "Militia allocation interface"; };
        //     class tocRequisitionUI   { description = "Asset requisition interface"; };
        };

        // ---- Utils ----
        class utils
        {
            class setMissionVar      { description = "Set a missionNamespace variable with optional RPT logging"; };
            class getMissionVar      { description = "Get a missionNamespace variable with default fallback and missing-key warning"; };
            class setProfileVar      { description = "Set a profileNamespace variable with optional RPT logging"; };
            class getProfileVar      { description = "Get a profileNamespace variable with default fallback and missing-key warning"; };
            class hasVar             { description = "Check whether a key exists on any namespace"; };
            class log                { description = "Write to RPT; also echoes to systemChat when OSF_debug is true"; };
            class getStateField  { description = "Returns a named field from an item's runtime state hashmap."; };
            class getStateKeys   { description = "Returns all IDs from a state registry hashmap."; };
            class getStateValues { description = "Returns all item hashmaps from a state registry."; };
        };
    };
